# La Icp Ms

**Summary**: Laser ablation inductively coupled plasma mass spectrometry for high-precision chemical analysis.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024]] used LA-ICP-MS to determine the age of zircons and other minerals in the pegmatite systems.

## Key Results and Findings

- LA-ICP-MS provided ages ranging from 749.9 ± 5.9 Ma to 631 ± 8 Ma for different parts of the Al-Ghurayyah pluton. ([[2024-sulistyohariyanto|Sulistyohariyanto, 2024, p. 30]])
